examples: The tables were inset with ceramic tiles.
Ceramic tiles were inset into the tables.
The mask is formed of a gold-platinum alloy inset with emeralds and other gems.
Inset above the pane of (non-Gorilla) glass is a wide, gunmetal speaker grille that covers the earpiece.
The sloped ceiling of the living roof has a gold leaf inset that is designed to reflect natural light.
